lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear consistent with age, such as small stone chips. The interior is well-maintained with only light signs of use. All mechanical and electrical components are functioning correctly.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor paint chips. The interior shows light signs of use. All mechanical systems are functioning properly.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is, ideally for parts or a full-scale restoration project. The engine suffers from a persistent heavy knock and significant oil and coolant leaks, indicating the need for a complete rebuild. Additionally, the transmission is slipping badly and fails to engage certain gears. The body has extensive rust damage on the rocker panels and frame, and the interior is in rough shape with torn seats and a cracked dashboard. Please expect a vehicle that is currently not roadworthy.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic work to be roadworthy. The exterior shows heavy wear, including several large dents, peeling clear coat, and visible rust on the rocker panels. Inside, the upholstery is heavily stained and torn in multiple places, and several electronic components, including the radio and air conditioning, are currently non-functional. Mechanically, the engine runs but idles roughly and there is a noticeable fluid leak that needs immediate attention. This car is being sold strictly as-is and would be best suited as a project vehicle or a source for parts.

Looking for a dependable daily driver that won't break the bank? This vehicle is ready to hit the road! It’s in fair condition, showing some honest wear and tear and minor cosmetic imperfections, but it remains a solid, functional choice for your commuting needs. A great opportunity to own a reliable car at a fantastic price!

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an uncompromising standard, it presents in showroom condition with a pristine exterior and a meticulously curated interior. Every mechanical component operates with factory-level precision, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. For the discerning buyer seeking an investment-grade example, this specimen stands as a definitive benchmark in its class.

Hey there! If you’ve been searching for a ride that’s basically brand new, you’ve found it! This beauty is in absolutely flawless condition—I’ve babied it since day one, and it still has that fresh showroom feel. It drives like a total dream and looks even better in person. You really won't find another one this clean, so come grab it before someone else does!

This concours-level E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance. The S54 power plant features a bulletproofed VANOS system and documented rod bearing replacement, ensuring peak mechanical integrity. Power is delivered via a precise ZF 6-speed manual to a reinforced rear subframe, while the chassis benefits from dialed-in suspension geometry and zero bushing deflection. Meticulously maintained with a comprehensive service history, this example retains factory-spec compression and unblemished aesthetics, offering an unfiltered, high-revving driving experience for the discerning collector.
Mint condition. Low mileage. No mechanical issues. Clean title in hand. Service records available.

Presenting a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that truly defies its age. This car is in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage and driven only on fair-weather weekends. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory-fresh luster without a single swirl mark, stone chip, or blemish. Inside, the premium leather interior remains supple and fragrant, showing zero signs of wear on the bolsters or carpets. Every feature—from the panoramic sunroof and high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assist technology—functions flawlessly. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history fully documented at authorized dealerships. It feels, smells, and drives exactly as it did the day it left the showroom floor. This is a collector-grade example for the discerning buyer who demands absolute perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard and preserved in showroom condition. This automobile represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a specimen of peerless mechanical and aesthetic integrity. Every detail remains consistent with factory specifications, ensuring an experience indistinguishable from new.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine showroom condition, reflecting a standard of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Meticulously maintained and mechanically flawless, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector who demands excellence without exception.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? I’m selling my absolute gem of a car, and honestly, it’s in such incredible shape you won’t believe it’s pre-owned! It’s been pampered since day one, kept in a climate-controlled garage, and there isn't a single scratch or speck of dust to be found. It drives like a dream and still has that fresh new-car smell. Come take a look—you’re going to fall in love with it!

Available is a collector-grade E46 M3 in concours condition. Under the hood lies the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. This example has undergone comprehensive preventative maintenance, including rod bearing replacement, a full VANOS overhaul, and rear subframe reinforcement. The chassis is dialed in with a factory limited-slip differential and Bilstein PSS10 coilovers, maintaining its precise corner-entry characteristics. Finished in pristine Carbon Black with no measurable paint depth variance, the exterior is flawless. This is a turn-key mechanical masterpiece for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Flawless original paint. No mechanical issues. Interior is like new. Service records available.

This 2021 BMW M340i xDrive is offered in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained by a single enthusiast owner. The Mineral White Metallic exterior is flawless, protected by a professional ceramic coating with absolutely no rock chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the Cognac Vernasca leather remains supple and unmarked, complemented by pristine carbon fiber trim and original floor mats that have seen minimal use. This vehicle has been exclusively garage-kept and remains smoke-free, retaining its original new-car scent. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history performed solely at BMW certified centers. Fully optioned with the Premium Package, Harman Kardon surround sound, and the Driving Assistance Professional suite, this car is indistinguishable from a brand-new model. It represents a rare opportunity for a buyer seeking perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior devoid of wear. Meticulously maintained to the highest standards, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its original debut. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a truly pristine example of engineering excellence.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen in pristine condition. This vehicle has been maintained to the highest standards, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a commitment to automotive excellence. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal are beyond reproach, making it a premier choice for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a showroom-quality vehicle that stands as a testament to superior care.

Hey there! You seriously have to see this beauty. It’s in absolutely stunning shape—honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it shows. Not a scratch on it, and the interior is totally pristine. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. Come take it for a spin, you won’t be disappointed!
This collector-grade specimen features a naturally aspirated 3.4L flat-six powerplant, delivering a linear power band and an evocative acoustic profile. The
Garage kept. Single owner. No scratches or mechanical issues. Full service history included. Pristine condition.

This vehicle is an absolute masterpiece, maintained to the highest standards and presenting in showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, while the interior remains factory-fresh, smelling of premium leather with no signs of wear on the bolsters or controls. Mechanically, it is flawless; every service has been performed ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships, and the engine bay is clean enough to eat off. It has been strictly garage-kept under a breathable cover and has never seen inclement weather. From the crisp response of the transmission to the silent, rattle-free cabin, this car offers a driving experience indistinguishable from the day it rolled off the lot. Complete with all original manuals, two keys, and a comprehensive binder of maintenance records, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast who demands perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in showroom condition with an impeccable service history. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior, reflects a legacy of meticulous care. This is an investment-grade opportunity for the discerning driver who demands absolute excellence and mechanical perfection.

Presenting a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit exhibits pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity, reflective of its showroom-quality provenance. Every detail has been meticulously preserved, offering the discerning buyer an uncompromising driving experience. This represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in peerless condition.

Hey everyone! 👋 I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This car is seriously in pristine, showroom condition—it’s been babied since day one! Not a single blemish to be found, and it drives just as smoothly as it looks. If you’re looking for a ride that feels brand new without the dealership price tag, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed! 🚗✨

This specimen represents a benchmark in automotive preservation, featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six power plant with individual throttle bodies and a precision-calibrated Vanos system. The drivetrain integrity is superlative, utilizing a six-speed manual gearbox that delivers power to a variable M-differential with zero lash. Every mechanical component, from the subframe reinforcement to the Bilstein-damped suspension, has been maintained to factory tolerances. The chassis remains structurally flawless, exhibiting no oxidation, while the cabin retains its original tactile feedback and stoichiometric efficiency. This is a concours-ready example for the discerning collector who demands mechanical perfection and linear power delivery.
Pristine condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents. Interior like new.

Offered here is an absolute gem of a vehicle, maintained to the highest possible standard. This car presents in showroom condition, boasting a deep, mirror-like finish on the exterior and a cabin that still carries that fresh, new-car scent. Every inch of the premium leather upholstery is supple and entirely free of wear, while the dashboard and interior trim remain pristine. Mechanically, the vehicle is flawless, having been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships with a comprehensive maintenance history included. It has been meticulously garage-kept under a soft cover and never driven in inclement weather. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who refuses to compromise on quality, this is the finest example currently available on the market.

Presented here is an automotive specimen of uncompromising caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, reflecting a standard of preservation rarely encountered in the secondary market. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the flawless exterior finish, confirms its status as a premier investment for the discerning driver. We invite you to experience a level of mechanical and aesthetic excellence that transcends the ordinary.
